code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    let b = match bopt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let final_val = sign * val
        if not have
          max_v = final_val
          min_v = final_val
          have = true
        else
          if final_val > max_v
            max_v = final_val
          end
          if final_val < min_v
            min_v = final_val
          end
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        val = b - 48
      else if is_minus
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        val = 0
      else if is_plus
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let final_val = sign * val
    if not have
      max_v = final_val
      min_v = final_val
      have = true
    else
      if final_val > max_v
        max_v = final_val
      end
      if final_val < min_v
        min_v = final_val
      end
    end
  end
  println("max=#{max_v}")
  println("min=#{min_v}")
end
